nasb.text: Some Sadducees (who say that there is no resurrection) *came to Jesus, and began questioning Him, saying,

esv.text: And Sadducees came to him, who say that there is no resurrection. And they asked him a question, saying,

cnv.text: 撒都該人向來認為沒有復活的事，他們來到耶穌那裡，問他：

ccb.text: 撒都该人向来不相信有复活的事，他们来问耶稣：

csbs.text: 接着，撒都该人来到耶稣那里，他们一向说没有复活的事。他们问耶稣，说：
